purpose: Tell Hermes how to interpret Report.json + goal.md when the file watcher fires a Telegram alert.

watch_targets.description: Live project status, changes, health, current phase
Project vision and phased roadmap — source of truth for next steps
This file — interpretation rules for the agent

phases.title: Scaffold + chat loop
phases.description: Chat UI, agent loop, Report.json, Telegram watcher

phases.title: list_files tool
phases.description: Agent can list files/dirs in any project path (sandboxed)

phases.title: read_file tool
phases.description: Agent can read text files with max size guard

phases.title: Prompt + tool routing
phases.description: System prompt teaches when to list vs read vs chat

phases.title: Smoke tests
phases.description: Chat: "list src/", "read main.py" — verify tool use

phases.title: Error handling
phases.description: Clear tool errors surfaced to user in chat

phases.title: Session memory
phases.description: Remember last N turns across chat session

phases.title: Write file tool
phases.description: Agent can propose/save file edits (with guardrails)

phases.title: Hermes gateway bridge
phases.description: Optional: same agent on Telegram natively

next_steps.step: Test in chat: 'list files in src/hermes_app'

workflow: 3. Confirm updated phase and next_steps to user
4. Report.json may update — watcher will send summary on next tick

examples.pick 2: Jump to next phase from goal.md
examples.focus on read_file first: Custom priority — updates next_steps in instruction.json

workflow: 2. Run: python3 scripts/sync_instruction.py (Hermes updates instruction.json — NOT Cursor)
5. Telegram: headline, changes, Phase X.Y status, next step from instruction.json

sections: Next step — one item from next_steps matching current_phase (e.g. Phase 1.1: Add list_files tool…)
telegram_format.example:
Project update

Chat loop active — user greeted agent.

Changes:
• User said hi
• Report updated

Status: ok | Phase 1.1 (in progress)

Next: Phase 1.1 — Add list_files tool in builtin.py

field_reference.next_steps: Phased tasks — always include current phase step in Telegram
field_reference.goal.md: Full vision and phase table — read for context, do not dump entire file

on_every_report_change: next_steps syncs from Report.status.next_steps when present
when_phase_completes: Chat agent or dev updates Report.json status.current_phase
Next cron tick: Hermes syncs instruction.json automatically
update_protocol.watcher_will: Report.json save → cron agent → sync instruction.json → Telegram

agent_mode.prompt_hint: Report.json changed. YOU must update instruction.json: run python3 scripts/sync_instruction.py from project root, then send Telegram summary with phase and next step. Do not ask the user to edit instruction.json.

proposed_next_steps.label: Continue Phase 1.1: list_files tool
proposed_next_steps.description: Agent can list files/dirs in any project path (sandboxed)

proposed_next_steps.label: Jump to Phase 1.2: read_file tool
proposed_next_steps.description: Agent can read text files with max size guard

proposed_next_steps.label: Your own priority — reply with free text
proposed_next_steps.description: Tell me what you want to focus on; I'll update instruction.json

outbound_telegram.body:
Project update

Phase 1.1 complete: list_files tool implemented and tested.

What changed:
  • User selected pick 1: Continue Phase 1.1: list_files tool
  • Added and tested the list_files tool.
  • User said hi.

Goal — Phase 1.1: list_files tool
  Agent can list files/dirs in any project path (sandboxed)

Recommended next (from goal.md):
  1. Continue Phase 1.1: list_files tool
  2. Jump to Phase 1.2: read_file tool

Your call — reply on Telegram:
  pick 1  → continue current phase
  pick 2  → jump to next phase
  or type your own priority (e.g. 'focus on read_file first')

Your last choice: Continue Phase 1.1: list_files tool

pick_options.label: Continue Phase 1.1: list_files tool
pick_options.description: Agent can list files/dirs in any project path (sandboxed)

pick_options.label: Jump to Phase 1.2: read_file tool
pick_options.description: Agent can read text files with max size guard

pick_options.label: Your own priority — reply with free text
pick_options.description: Tell me what you want to focus on; I'll update instruction.json

outbound_telegram.reply_hint: pick 1 | pick 2 | or type your priority
